# Haneul Documentation

> Haneul is a next-generation smart contract platform with high throughput, low latency, and an asset-oriented programming model powered by Move

## General

- [Concepts](https://docs.haneul.io/concepts.md)
- [Guides](https://docs.haneul.io/guides.md)
- [References Overview](https://docs.haneul.io/references.md)
- [Haneul Standards Overview](https://docs.haneul.io/standards.md)
- [Code Of Conduct](https://docs.haneul.io/code-of-conduct)
- [Contribute To Haneul Repos](https://docs.haneul.io/contribute-to-haneul-repos)
- [Exchange Integration Guide](https://docs.haneul.io/exchange-integration-guide)
- [Localize Haneul Docs](https://docs.haneul.io/localize-haneul-docs)
- [Style Guide](https://docs.haneul.io/style-guide)
- [Haneul Compared](https://docs.haneul.io/haneul-compared)
- [Haneul Framework Reference](https://docs.haneul.io/haneul-framework-reference)
- [Haneul Glossary](https://docs.haneul.io/haneul-glossary)
